call-top: padding: 50px 16px 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
rec: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 5px 10px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.45); border-radius: 999px;
rec-dot: width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--red); animation: pulse 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;
call-timer: font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: var(--text);
tile: aspect-ratio: 16/9; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface-2); position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
tile-av: width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(45,140,255,0.30); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;
tile-label: position: absolute; left: 8px; bottom: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
mute-badge: width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--red); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
name-chip: background: rgba(0,0,0,0.45); border-radius: 4px; padding: 3px 6px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;
ctrl: flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; color: var(--text);
ctrl-leave: margin-left: 4px; background: var(--red); color: #fff; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px;
